case_title: STEVE EVANS et al VS. ENRIQUE TAPIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, STEVE ALHARK, KAHEEL AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, ENRIQUE ET&S LIMOUSINE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-12-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-10-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-28-2010

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-06-2010. NOV-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-05-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, STEVE ALHARK, KAHEEL SERVED AUG-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, ENRIQUE
ARBITRATOR ERNEST BENJAMIN LAGESON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-06-2010 THROUGH MAR-06-2011.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-05-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, STEVE ALHARK, KAHEEL SERVED AUG-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ET&S LIMOUSINE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TAPI, ENRIQUE , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ET&S LIMOUSINE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
